history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 2 column B facing right. The goal is at row 4 column D. To get there, I need to move right to column C, then D, then turn down and move down to row 3 column D and then to row 4 column D. The cell directly in front is (2,C) which is floor (`.`). So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2 column C facing right. The cell in front is (2,D), which is a floor cell. I will move forward to get closer to the goal at (4,D).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column D, facing right. The cell in front is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. I need to go down to reach the goal at row 4, column D. Turning right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column D, facing down. The cell directly ahead is row 3, column D, which is a floor cell (.) and safe. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column D, facing down. The cell ahead (row 4, column D) is the goal G. I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
